# EMS — Expense Management for Multi-Branch Businesses

> EMS is a SaaS expense management platform for businesses that operate
> multiple branches, stores or warehouses. It centralizes expense tracking,
> promotions, approvals, custom roles and audit history in one mobile-first
> app, with executive dashboards and an AI assistant for natural-language
> reporting.

## What EMS does

- Multi-branch expense tracking: every expense belongs to a branch and a
  category; branch managers see only the branches assigned to them.
- Custom roles & permissions: five built-in roles (CEO, Admin, Branch
  Manager, Data Entry, Finance) plus fully custom roles assembled from
  granular permissions (e.g. a view-only CEO or a CFO who can approve and
  delete expenses).
- Executive dashboards: monthly trends, category and branch breakdowns,
  month-over-month change, end-of-month projections and anomaly alerts when
  a category or branch spikes above its usual spending.
- Append-only audit log: every create, update and delete is recorded and
  cannot be modified — enforced at the database level.
- Promotions tracking: marketing campaigns and their costs live alongside
  day-to-day expenses.
- Mobile-first UI: designed for phones first, desktop second.

## Plans

- Free tier — no credit card required.
- Pro and Ultimate tiers — new workspaces start with a 14-day Pro trial.
- Pricing details: /pricing

## Key pages

- Home: /
- Pricing: /pricing
- Create a workspace: /signup
- About: /about
- Contact: /contact

## Who it's for

Retail chains, warehouses, distribution companies, restaurant groups,
pharmacies, clinics — any business where money is spent across more than one
location and the owner wants to see where it goes.
